remarks: Newly remodeled one-bedroom in the highly desirable Winnipauk community. Enjoy access to two swimming pools and tennis courts, along with the convenience of an assigned parking space and in-unit washer and dryer. Rent includes pool access and trash service.  Ideally located just minutes from shopping, beaches, restaurants, Interstate 95, the Merritt Parkway, and Route 7, with easy access to the train station for commuting.  A perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and lifestyle-make this your next home.
